translations.**優點：**\n檢查程式是由外部注入，不依賴在專案上，可以不透過 XCode、:
**Advantages:**  
The checker is injected externally and does not depend on the project. It can run without Xcode or building the project, and the check can pinpoint the exact file and line number. Additionally, it can perform formatting functions (sorting multilingual keys from A to Z).
translations.**從 Bundle 讀取出 `.strings` 並轉成物件：**\n\n: **Read `.strings` from Bundle and convert to object:**
translations.**缺點：**\n增加 Build Time (+ ~= 3 mins)、流程發:
**Disadvantages:**  
Increases Build Time (+ ~= 3 mins) and process complexity. If the script has issues or needs adjustment for the project structure, it is hard to hand over and maintain. Since this part is outside the project, only those who added this check understand the entire logic, making it difficult for other collaborators to handle.
translations.**這邊有幾個需要注意的：**\n\n: **Here are a few points to note:**
translations.- Fast execution speed, no impact on Bui:
- Fast execution speed, no impact on Build Time

- Maintained by every iOS developer.
translations.- Localizable.strings Format Validation:
- Localizable.strings Format Validation (Line breaks must end with `;`, valid Key-Value pairs)

- The multilingual keys used in the code must have corresponding definitions in the Localizable.strings file.

- Each Localizable.strings file for every language must have the corresponding Key-Value records.

- Localizable.strings files must not have duplicate Keys (otherwise the Value may be accidentally overwritten)
translations.- New Xcode Helps Us Ensure .strings Fil:
- New Xcode Helps Us Ensure .strings File Format Correctness ✅

- SwiftGen ensures no typos or undeclared references when accessing multilingual strings in the CodeBase ✅

- UnitTest Ensures Multilingual Content Accuracy ✅
translations.- Swift -> NSLocalizedString without par:
- Swift -> NSLocalizedString without parameters

- Swift -> NSLocalizedString with Parameters Scenario

- OC -> NSLocalizedString without parameters

- OC -> NSLocalizedString with Parameters Situation
translations.- Using `Bundle(for: type(of: self))` to:
- Using `Bundle(for: type(of: self))` to Access Resources from Test Target

- Remember to set the Test Target's [STRINGS_FILE_OUTPUT_ENCODING](https://developer.apple.com/forums/thread/71779){:target="_blank"} to `UTF-8`, otherwise reading file content with String will fail (the default is Binary).

- The reason for using String reading instead of NSDictionary is that we need to test for duplicate Keys. Using NSDictionary will overwrite duplicate Keys during reading.

- Remember to add the `.strings` file to the Test Target.
translations.> However, SwiftGen can only generate fr: > However, SwiftGen can only generate from a specific language, so it cannot prevent cases where a key exists in one language but is missing in others; this issue can only be prevented using the UnitTest below.
translations.> Interested readers can refer to the pr: > Interested readers can refer to the previous article. This article mainly introduces the method of using Xcode 13 + SwiftGen + UnitTest to achieve comprehensive checks of Localizable.strings.
translations.> Please note that SwiftGen is not a rea: > Please note that SwiftGen is not a real CocoaPod; it does not have any dependencies with the project's code. Installing SwiftGen via CocoaPods simply downloads the Command Line Tool executable.
translations.> With Object Access, typos and cases wh: > With Object Access, typos and cases where the Key used in the code is not declared in the Localizable.strings file can no longer occur.
translations.Input: (DevelopmentLocalization 沒有這個 Key: Input: (The key "DevelopmentLocalization" does not exist, but it appears in other languages)
translations.Input: (相較 DevelopmentLocalization 其他語系缺: Input: (Compared to DevelopmentLocalization, other languages lack declared Keys)
translations.Localizable.strings 格式正確檢查 (換行結尾需加上 `;`: Localizable.strings Format Validation (Line breaks must end with `;`, valid Key-Value pairs)
translations.Localizable.strings 檔不能有重複的 Key (否則 Valu: Localizable.strings files must not have duplicate Keys (otherwise the Value may be accidentally overwritten)
translations.Localizable.strings 檔各個語系都要有相應的 Key Valu: Each Localizable.strings file for every language must have the corresponding Key-Value records.
translations.SwiftGen 核心也是 Command Line Tool；但是這工具在業界: SwiftGen is also a Command Line Tool; however, it is quite popular in the industry and has comprehensive documentation and community support, so there is no need to worry about maintenance issues after adopting this tool.
translations.SwiftGen 確保 CodeBase 引用多語系時不會打錯或沒宣告就引用 ✅: SwiftGen ensures no typos or undeclared references when accessing multilingual strings in the CodeBase ✅
translations.[SwiftGen](https://github.com/SwiftGen/S: [SwiftGen](https://github.com/SwiftGen/SwiftGen){:target="_blank"} helps us change the original NSLocalizedString string access method to object access, preventing typos and missing key declarations.
translations.```bash\nif [[ -f \"${PODS_ROOT}/SwiftGe:
```bash
if [[ -f "${PODS_ROOT}/SwiftGen/bin/swiftgen" ]]; then
  echo "${PODS_ROOT}/SwiftGen/bin/swiftgen"
  "${PODS_ROOT}/SwiftGen/bin/swiftgen"
else
  echo "warning: SwiftGen is not installed. Run 'pod install --repo-update' to install it."
fi
```
translations.```yaml\nstrings:\n - inputs:\n -:
```yaml
strings:
  - inputs:
      - "L10NTests/Supporting Files/zh-Hant.lproj/Localizable.strings"
    outputs:
      templateName: structured-swift5
      output: "L10NTests/Supporting Files/SwiftGen-L10n.swift"
      params:
        enumName: "L10n"
```

```yaml
strings:
  - inputs:
      - "L10NTests/Supporting Files/zh-Hant.lproj/Localizable.strings"
    outputs:
      templatePath: "path/to/flat-swift5-objc.stencil"
      output: "L10NTests/Supporting Files/SwiftGen-L10n.swift"
      params:
        enumName: "L10n"
```
translations.`pod install` 之後打開 Terminal `cd` 到專案下\n\: After running `pod install`, open Terminal and `cd` to the project directory.
translations.iOS 的多語系處理方式是 Localizable.strings 純文字檔案，: iOS handles multiple languages using plain text Localizable.strings files, unlike Android which uses XML format for management. This creates risks of accidentally corrupting or missing entries in the language files during development. Moreover, multi-language issues are not detected at Build Time and often only discovered after release through user reports from specific regions, which greatly reduces user confidence.
translations.init `swiftgen.yml` 設定檔，並打開它\n\n: Initialize the `swiftgen.yml` configuration file and open it.
translations.swiftgen 可以不用放在 build phase，因為每次 build 都: SwiftGen does not need to be placed in the build phase because it runs every time you build, and the code only appears after the build is complete. Instead, you can run the command to generate code only when there are changes.
translations.之前的做法是「 [Xcode 直接使用 Swift 撰寫 Shell Scrip: The previous approach was to "Use Swift to write Shell Scripts directly in Xcode!" (see ../41c49a75a743/) and reference the [Localize 🏁](https://github.com/freshOS/Localize){:target="_blank"} tool. This tool uses Swift to develop a Command Line Tool for external localization file checks, then places the script into the Build Phases Run Script to perform checks during Build Time.
translations.之前血淋淋的案例，大家 Swift 寫的太習慣忘記 Localizable.st: From past painful experiences, developers accustomed to writing Swift often forgot to add `;` in Localizable.strings, causing all strings after the missing `;` in a certain language to break after release; only an urgent hotfix saved the situation.
translations.以上提供一個網路搜集來&客製化過兼容 Swift 和 OC 的模板，可自行建立: Here is a customized template compatible with both Swift and Objective-C, collected from the web. You can create a `flat-swift5-objc.stencil` file and paste the content, or [click here to download the .zip directly](https://gist.github.com/zhgchgli0718/34cc6af6366add93f16632efd5575691/archive/bcccc0fb7367c8f9e58b8453446f0a52631aa8d1.zip){:target="_blank"}.
translations.但 SwiftGen 只能指定從某個語系產生，所以無法阻擋產生的語系有這個 Ke: However, SwiftGen can only generate from a specific language, so it cannot prevent cases where a key exists in one language but is missing in others; this issue can only be protected against using the UnitTest below.
translations.使用 String 讀取而不用 NSDictionary 的原因是，我們需要測試: The reason for using String reading instead of NSDictionary is that we need to test for duplicate Keys. Using NSDictionary will overwrite duplicate Keys during reading.

translations.升級 XCode 13 之後就內建了 Build Time 檢查 Localiz: After upgrading to Xcode 13, it now includes a built-in Build Time check for the Localizable.strings file format. Tests show the check is quite thorough; besides missing `;`, it also blocks extra meaningless strings.
translations.只要是 iOS 開發者都會維護\n: Every iOS developer will maintain it.
translations.可以下 `swiftGen template list` 取得內建的模板列表\n: You can run `swiftGen template list` to get the list of built-in templates.

translations.執行速度快，不拖累 Build Time\n: Fast execution speed, no impact on Build Time
translations.如上圖所示，假設 `DESCRIPTION` Key 漏加， App就會直接顯示: As shown in the image above, if the `DESCRIPTION` key is missing, the app will directly display `DESCRIPTION` to the user.
translations.如同之前「 [2021 Pinkoi Tech Career Talk — 高效: As mentioned in the previous talk "[2021 Pinkoi Tech Career Talk — Secrets of High-Efficiency Engineering Teams](../11f6c8568154/)," multilingual work in large teams can be separated through third-party services to manage dependencies in multilingual tasks.
translations.將 templatePath 路徑指定到 .stencil 模板在專案中的位置即: Just set the templatePath to the location of the .stencil template within the project.
translations.工程師只需定義好 Key，多語系會在 CI/CD 階段從平台自動匯入，少了人工維: Engineers only need to define the Keys, and the multilingual content will be automatically imported from the platform during the CI/CD stage, reducing manual maintenance and minimizing errors.
translations.差別在如果 Key 風格是 `XXX.YYY.ZZZ` flat 模板會轉換成小: The difference is that if the Key style is `XXX.YYY.ZZZ`, the flat template will convert it to camelCase; the structured template will keep the original style and convert it into a `XXX.YYY.ZZZ` object.
translations.建議一次轉換一個情境，能 Build 過再轉換下一個。\n\n: It is recommended to convert one scenario at a time and proceed to the next only after a successful build.
translations.我們可以透過撰寫 UniTest 從 Bundle 讀取出 `.strings`: We can write UnitTests to read the contents of `.strings` files from the Bundle and perform tests.
translations.我們定義我們定義了一個 `Localization` 來存放頗析出來的資料，從: We define a `Localization` to store the parsed data. It searches for `lproj` folders within the `Bundle`, then finds `.strings` files inside them. Using regular expressions, it converts the multilingual strings into objects and stores them back into `Localization` for later testing.
translations.新版 XCode 幫我們確保 .strings 檔案格式正確性 ✅\n: New Xcode Helps Us Ensure .strings File Format Correctness ✅
translations.有了 Object Access 後就不可能出現打錯字及 Code 裡面有在用的: With Object Access, typos and cases where the Key used in the code is not declared in the Localizable.strings file can no longer occur.

translations.沒有什麼特別的解法，只能自己寫一個 Command Line Tools，可參考: There is no special solution; you can only write your own Command Line Tool. You can refer to the previous article [上一篇文章](../41c49a75a743/) which uses Swift to scan the project directory and parse NSLocalizedString with Regex to create a small tool for conversion.
translations.程式碼中有取用的多語系 Key 要在 Localizable.strings 檔: The multilingual keys used in the code must have corresponding definitions in the Localizable.strings file.

translations.設定好之後可以回到 Termnial 手動下：\n\n: After setting up, you can go back to the Terminal and manually run:
translations.請注意 SwiftGen 並不是真的 CocoaPods，他不會跟專案中的程式碼: Please note that SwiftGen is not a real CocoaPod; it does not have any dependencies with the project's code. Installing SwiftGen via CocoaPods simply downloads the Command Line Tool executable.
translations.貼上並修改成符合您專案的格式：\n\n: Paste and modify it to match your project's format:
translations.轉換才是這個問題最困難的地方，因為已開發完成的專案中大量使用 NSLocaliz: The hardest part is the conversion because the existing project heavily uses NSLocalizedString, which needs to be converted to the new `L10n.XXX` format. It becomes even more complex when dealing with parameterized strings like `String(format: NSLocalizedString`. Additionally, if there is mixed Objective-C code, the different syntax between Objective-C and Swift must also be considered.
translations.這個解決方案無法達成，還是需使用原本 [用 Swift 寫的 Command L: This solution cannot be achieved, so you still need to use the original [Command Line Tool written in Swift to accomplish it](../41c49a75a743/). However, the formatting part can be done in git pre-commit; if there is no diff, no action is taken to avoid running it on every build:
translations.這樣在每次 Build 專案時都會跑 Generator 產出最新的轉換結果。\: This way, the generator runs every time the project is built to produce the latest conversion results.
